questions.text: Did you have PAYG (employee) income?
Did you receive Centrelink or other government payments?
Did you receive bank interest?
Did you receive dividends or managed fund distributions?
Were you a beneficiary of a trust?
Did you receive rental income from any property?
Did any property earn Airbnb / short-stay income?
Did you have sole-trader or business income?
Did a company pay you wages, director fees, dividends, or loans?
Did you receive any foreign income?
Did you buy, sell, swap, stake or spend crypto?
Did you sell shares, ETFs, property, or other assets?
Did you receive compensation, insurance payout, inheritance, or estate distribution?
Did you use your own car for work-related travel (not normal home-to-work)?

yes.text: Do you have a valid logbook?

questions.text: Did you use phone or internet for work?
Did you work from home?
Did you buy or launder compulsory uniform or protective clothing?
Did you pay professional registration, licences, or work-related memberships (AHPRA, union, etc.)?
Did you pay for self-education / CPD related to your current job?
Did you buy tools, equipment, laptop or work devices?
Did you make donations to registered charities (DGRs)?
Did you pay income protection insurance personally?
Did you pay tax agent or accountant fees?
Did you make personal super contributions you want to claim?
Did you have private hospital cover?
Did you have a spouse or de facto partner during the year?
Did you have dependent children?
Do you have a HECS / HELP debt?
Was the company trading or dormant this year?
Is the company registered for GST?
Did the company pay any employees or directors?
Did the company own or buy assets during the year?
Were there any loans to/from directors or shareholders?
Did the company pay any private expenses on behalf of a director/shareholder?
Did the company earn sales/services income?
Did the company earn interest income?
Did the company receive any government grants?
Trust profile questions will be added in a future phase.
Sole trader profile questions will be added in a future phase.
